title: Blue Pink Balloons, 62 Pcs Happy Birthday Balloons 12 Inch Light Pink, Baby Blue, Metallic Blue Pink Helium Balloon with Confett for Gender Reveal, Birthday Decorations, Baby Shower Decorations
features: 【Blue Pink Balloons Pack】62pcs 12-inch blue pink helium balloons include light pink balloons(12-inch x 12), baby blue balloons(12-inch x 12), metallic pink balloos(12-inch x 10),metallic blue balloos(12-inch x 10),blue confett balloos(12-inch x 8),pink metallic balloos(12-inch x 8), and we also provide 1pc pink ribbon and 1pc blue ribbon. Frigg balloons which elevate your celebration and create an instantly elegant and joyful atmosphere.

【High Quality Materials】Frigg balloons are crafted from premium natural latex, these latex balloons are odor-free, focus on celebrating with peace of mind, ensuring both a beautiful display and greater safety and these allow for a confident inflation and a truly worry-free party experience.

【Easy DIY & Decoration】Frigg party balloons are a breeze to inflate with a hand pump or helium tank. Create stunning party decorations in just minutes. Experience the joy of bonding with loved ones through a fun craft activity, transforming your space instantly for a festive celebration.

【Perfect Party Decorations】Frigg blue pink balloon set features muted green tones, Set the scene for romance and celebration. These balloons are the perfect accent for any theme - for birthdays, graduations, baby showers, anniversary, gender reveal, weddings, engagement, valentine's day, christmas, new year and more other parties.

【Kindly Note】To ensure your balloons look their best, we recommend inflating them gently without overstretching. Please also display them away from heat, sunlight, and any sharp or abrasive surfaces. If you have any concerns, please contact us. We guarantee a response within 24 hours and will work diligently towards a resolution.
